---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: 'feat: '
labels: ['feature', 'needs-spec']
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

<!--
What problem does this feature solve?
Why is this important? Who is affected?
-->

## Proposed Solution

<!--
Describe the feature you'd like.
Be as specific as possible about the expected behavior.
-->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!--
List the conditions that must be true for this feature to be considered complete.
-->

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Out of Scope

<!--
What does this feature explicitly NOT include?
Helps prevent scope creep.
-->

## Alternatives Considered

<!--
What other approaches did you consider? Why was this one preferred?
-->

## Additional Context

<!--
Screenshots, mockups, links to related issues, references to similar features in other tools.
-->

## Complexity Estimate

<!--
Optional: XS / S / M / L / XL
-->
